memory_hint:
This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: ChunkLoadError: Loading chunk node_modules_next_dist_client_dev_noop_js failed.

Delete the .next folder at the root of your project, relaunch your project, and force-refresh yo. This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns. The root cause is error:

ChunkLoadError: Loading chunk node_modules_next_dist_client_dev_noop_js failed.
(error: http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunk.
